metadata.source_description: HIFLD Electric Power Transmission Lines, filtered to 345kV+ within PJM bounding box (xmin=-90, ymin=35, xmax=-73, ymax=43)
metadata.jurisdiction: PJM region (bounding box, not spatially clipped to exact boundary)
metadata.citation: Homeland Infrastructure Foundation-Level Data (HIFLD). 'Electric Power Transmission Lines.' U.S. Department of Homeland Security, CISA. Accessed March 29, 2026.
known_gaps: Bounding box filter includes some non-PJM lines in border areas.
Only 345kV+ lines shown — lower voltage distribution lines excluded for performance.
Some line segments may be incomplete or have imprecise routing.
HIFLD data vintage may lag actual grid state by 6-12 months.
metadata.notes: 345kV+ lines represent the bulk power transmission backbone. Lower voltage lines (69-230kV) excluded to keep layer performant (~1.2K vs ~25K segments).
